title: centaurea jovinianum
intro: Centaurea jovinianum, also known as the Jovinian centaury, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Centaurea jovinianum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
